name: tiktok_shop_showcase_scraper
title: TikTok Shop Creator Showcase Scraper
description: Retrieve normalized products from an arbitrary public creator's US TikTok Shop showcase through a managed provider.

seo.title: TikTok Shop Creator Showcase Scraper API
seo.description: Get the products, prices, ratings, sales signals, and pagination cursor in a public TikTok creator's Shop showcase.
seo.intro: Retrieve a public creator's US TikTok Shop showcase through Better Fetch's metered managed-provider boundary. The response is normalized and provider credentials never enter your tool input.

useCases.title: Creator commerce research
useCases.description: See which products a public TikTok creator currently features in their Shop showcase.

useCases.title: Affiliate monitoring
useCases.description: Track changes to creator product selection, pricing, ratings, and public sales signals.

useCases.title: Product discovery
useCases.description: Follow canonical TikTok Shop product URLs from creator-led discovery workflows.

faqs.question: Does the caller provide a third-party API key?
faqs.answer: No. Better Fetch owns the managed-provider credential and never accepts or returns provider account data.

faqs.question: Why does a run cost six credits?
faqs.answer: Creator showcases require a paid managed upstream. Six credits preserve transparent unit economics instead of hiding external retrieval cost inside an ordinary page-fetch rate.

faqs.question: Which regions are supported?
faqs.answer: The current managed contract supports US TikTok Shop showcases only.

handle.description: Public TikTok creator handle, with or without @.

cursor.description: Opaque next-page cursor from a prior result.
